name: NetDocuments Cloud DMS REST API
what_it_does: NetDocuments cloud-based document management system (DMS) REST API for law firms and legal departments to automate document storage, retrieval, matter-based organization, and collaboration — enabling AI agents to search and retrieve legal documents, manage matter workspaces, handle document versioning, and integrate document workflows with practice management and e-discovery platforms through NetDocuments' cloud-native legal DMS. Enables AI agents to manage document management for legal document upload, retrieval, and version control automation, handle workspace management for matter and client workspace creation and configuration automation, access search management for full-text and metadata document search automation, retrieve collaboration management for document sharing, permission, and review workflow automation, manage profile management for document metadata and classification attribute management automation, handle cabinet management for document cabinet and folder organization automation, access version management for document version history and comparison automation, retrieve checkout management for document checkout, edit lock, and check-in workflow automation, manage integration management for practice management and e-discovery platform integration automation, and integrate NetDocuments with Clio, iManage, Relativity, and enterprise legal platforms for cloud DMS automation.
use_cases: Searching and retrieving legal documents by matter, client, or document type for legal workflow automation agents
Managing matter workspace creation and document filing for law firm practice management agents
Automating document version control and checkout workflows for legal document review automation agents
Integrating document retrieval with e-discovery and practice management platforms for legal operations agents
not_for: General enterprise content management (NetDocuments is legal-specific DMS; SharePoint and Box serve general ECM)
E-discovery review and document production (NetDocuments stores legal documents; Relativity and Logikcull serve e-discovery review)
Contract lifecycle management (NetDocuments stores contracts; Ironclad and DocuSign CLM serve contract lifecycle automation)
best_when: A law firm or legal department wanting AI agents to automate cloud-based document search, retrieval, matter workspace management, and document workflow integration through NetDocuments' legal-specific cloud DMS.
avoid_when: NETDOCUMENTS ACCOUNT IS REQUIRED: NetDocuments serves law firms and legal departments; automated open-developer assumption creates account_required for organizations without NetDocuments subscription; automated must have active NetDocuments account. MATTER STRUCTURE IS FIRM-SPECIFIC: Document organization follows firm-specific matter numbering and profile schema; automated standard-schema assumption creates document_not_found for queries using generic matter numbers not matching firm's configured profile schema; automated must understand firm-specific matter structure before querying documents. DOCUMENT CHECKOUT IS REQUIRED FOR EDITING: NetDocuments checkout locks documents during editing to prevent conflicts; automated concurrent-edit assumption creates document_locked for edit operations on documents already checked out by another user; automated must check checkout status and handle lock conflicts. CABINET AND REPOSITORY HIERARCHY VARIES: NetDocuments storage hierarchy (repository → cabinet → workspace → folder) is configured per firm; automated flat-structure assumption creates path_not_found for document operations using incorrect hierarchy; automated must discover firm-specific cabinet and workspace structure before operations.

auth.notes: NetDocuments uses OAuth2 for Cloud DMS REST API. REST API with JSON. Lehi, UT HQ. Founded 1999 by Matthew Attaway. Private equity: Clearlake Capital (acquired 2019). Products: NetDocuments DMS (cloud document management), ndMail (email management), ndSearch (enterprise search). 3,000+ law firms and legal departments. 250,000+ legal users. 99.9% SLA. Competes with iManage, Worldox, and OpenText eDOCS for legal cloud DMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; law firm/legal subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user annual subscription; storage-based tiers; enterprise custom pricing for large law firms
pricing.notes: Lehi UT. Clearlake Capital PE. 3,000+ law firms. Per-user annual subscription. 99.9% uptime SLA.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per OAuth2 token; document query APIs throttled per subscription

known_agent_gotchas: PROFILE SCHEMA IS FIRM-CONFIGURED: NetDocuments document profiles (matter number, document type, author) are defined per firm; automated generic-profile assumption creates profile_validation_error for document uploads not matching firm-specific profile attribute schema; automated must query firm profile definitions before document operations

CHECKOUT IS EXCLUSIVE LOCK: Document checkout exclusively locks document for editing; automated optimistic-concurrency assumption creates document_locked for edit operations on documents already checked out; automated must handle checkout conflicts and implement retry or notification logic

SEARCH SYNTAX IS NETDOCUMENTS-SPECIFIC: Full-text search uses NetDocuments query syntax; automated SQL assumption creates search_error for queries using SQL WHERE clause syntax instead of NetDocuments search expressions; automated must use NetDocuments-specific search syntax for document discovery

REPOSITORY SELECTION AFFECTS SCOPE: NetDocuments queries must target specific repository; automated global-search assumption creates incomplete_results for searches not specifying repository when firm has multiple repositories; automated must specify target repository for comprehensive search

DOCUMENT RENDERING IS SEPARATE API CALL: Retrieving document content requires separate download call after locating document metadata; automated inline-content assumption creates missing_content for metadata-only queries not followed by content download; automated must make explicit download call after document discovery
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal cloud DMS. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Legal document content and matter metadata.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal DMS. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Legal document and matter workspace data.
